behavior_summary: AIRTEST1::hatch implements an egg-hatching choreography: it gates whether hatching occurs, marks egg state, plays sound and visual effects (lightning and particle helpers), spawns one or more items (hatchlings/fragments), and scatters or places those items around the egg with randomized offsets and timings.

The routine uses randomness (urandom) to vary spawn offsets, timings and sound variants, and delegates per-item creation/placement to helper processes that set frames, move/hurl items, or destroy them when out of bounds.

A global flag passedCenteredTest is read at entry and written in one branch (likely to record a centered/hit outcome); passedWisdomTest is read (negated) to influence the entry gate. Egg state is read via Egg::getEggId and updated via Egg::setEggId to indicate U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch progress.
notable_control_flow: Entry gate: AIRTEST1::hatch proceeds only if (passedCenteredTest OR NOT passedWisdomTest OR Egg::getEggId(egg) > 0). If this combined condition is false the function returns early.
On proceed, U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch sets the egg id (Egg::setEggId) and spawns multiple visual/sound helpers and short suspend/timed waits to drive the multi-step U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch sequence.

Item creation and placement is split into helper processes: U8P_AIRTEST1::0639 handles creating/popping items and animation/frame decisions; U8P_AIRTEST1::0392 computes target offsets and either moves or hurls items with bounds checking; U8P_AIRTEST1::035F plays one of two short U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch sounds selected at random.
Loops/iterations: local counters (BP-02, BP-04) throttle repeated spawn attempts and change branching after a few iterations (used to vary number/behavior of spawned fragments).
open_questions: Exact meaning and numeric values used for Egg::getEggId/Egg::setEggId (what id values represent which egg states) are not explicit in the disassembly.
Precise game-facing semantics of passedCenteredTest and passedWisdomTest beyond their gating role: e.g., what gameplay checks set those flags earlier and how they should be interpreted by designers.
Exact item types created by Item::create in this sequence (which shape/item ids correspond to hatchlings vs fragments) are not enumerated here.
Some free processes (FREE::29D8, FREE::1C6D, FREE::1C19, FREE::1C8B) are inferred to be visual/timer helpers; their internal behaviors and parameters are unknown.

main_function.name: U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch
main_function.purpose: Manage the egg-hatching event: check gating conditions, mark egg state, spawn layered audiovisual effects, create and place resulting items (hatchlings/fragments), and orchestrate timing/randomization for a multi-step U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch sequence.
entry_conditions: Triggered by Event 7 (U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch) invoked for an egg item instance.
Sequence continues only if (passedCenteredTest OR NOT passedWisdomTest OR Egg::getEggId(egg) > 0). Otherwise returns early.

function_map.name: U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch
function_map.role: Primary event handler that coordinates egg U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch sequence, spawns effects and delegates item creation/placement.

function_map.name: U8P_AIRTEST1::035F
function_map.role: Plays one of two short U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch sound effect variants selected via urandom and playSFX to add audio variation.

function_map.name: U8P_AIRTEST1::0392
function_map.role: Compute and clamp target offsets/positions and either move or hurl a spawned item to a computed map tile; enforces bounds and chooses movement method.

function_map.name: U8P_AIRTEST1::0639
function_map.role: Create/pop a new item at an offset from the egg, set its animation frame or destroy if invalid, and drive per-item placement/animation until finished.

function_map.name: Egg::getEggId
function_map.role: Query egg state/id to decide whether U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch should run or to pick behavior.

function_map.name: Egg::setEggId
function_map.role: Set egg state/id to mark that hatching is underway or completed.

function_map.name: Item::create
function_map.role: Allocate a new item instance (hatchling or fragment).

function_map.name: Item::pop
function_map.role: Place a created item into the world at given coordinates.

function_map.name: Item::move
function_map.role: Move an item to a tile when placement is direct and in-bounds.

function_map.name: Item::hurl
function_map.role: Throw/launch an item to a destination tile to create scattering motion.

function_map.name: Item::destroy
function_map.role: Remove an item instance (used when placement/frame is invalid or out-of-bounds).

function_map.name: U8P_AIRTEST1::playSFX
function_map.role: Play a U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch-related sound effect variant.

function_map.name: urandom
function_map.role: Produce random values used to vary offsets, timing, and effect selection.

function_map.name: FREE::00E1h (LightningBolt)
function_map.role: Spawn lightning/visual effect processes anchored to the egg location during U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch.

function_map.name: FREE::29D8, FREE::1C6D, FREE::1C19, FREE::1C8B
function_map.role: Spawn miscellaneous visual/timer helper processes used to layer effects and spacing in the U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch choreography.

internal_calls.purpose: Trigger a short randomized U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch sound effect during the sequence.
Spawn per-item creation/pop helper to instantiate a hatchling/fragment at a computed offset from the egg.
Spawn scatter/movement helper to compute destination and move/hurl spawned fragments to nearby tiles.
Delegate final placement/movement of created items to the movement/hurling helper when appropriate.

external_calls.purpose: Read egg state to decide whether the U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch sequence should run or be altered.
Mark or change the egg's id/state to indicate hatching progress.
Spawn lightning visual effects at the egg during U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch sequence.
Spawn layered visual/timer helper processes to create particle effects and timing delays.
Play a chosen U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch sound variant based on urandom output.
Produce randomized offsets, timings, and selection of effect variants to make U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch non-deterministic.
Allocate a new item instance (likely a hatchling or fragment) for placement.
Place the newly created item into the world at computed x,y,z coordinates.
Set the visual frame or animation state of the spawned item; destroy it if frame/position invalid.
Move an item to a computed destination when the destination is in-bounds and direct placement is appropriate.
Throw/launch an item to a destination tile to create scattering motion when appropriate.
Destroy items that fall outside allowed placement bounds or otherwise invalid.
Read egg coordinates to compute spawn/pop positions and anchor visual effects.

reads.name: passedCenteredTest
reads.likely_effect: Read to determine if the U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch sequence should run or choose a centered outcome branch; influences spawn branching.

reads.name: passedWisdomTest
reads.likely_effect: Read (negated) as part of the gate that allows the U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch sequence to proceed when wisdom test not passed.

writes.name: passedCenteredTest
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 in one branch to record that a centered test/outcome occurred during U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch (used to gate later behavior).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: AIRTEST1::hatch implements an egg-hatching choreography: it gates whether hatching occurs, marks egg state, plays sound and visual effects (lightning and particle helpers), spawns one or more items (hatchlings/fragments), and scatters or places those items around the egg with randomized offsets and timings.
